title: Captcha
body:
If you've been around the internet you know all about Captcha's. This mod adds them to Minecraft!
By default the mod will require the user to finish a Captcha to continue doing what they were doing. The default cooldown between Captcha requests is 15 minutes.

Currently you can experience the following Captcha types using the mod: * I'm not a monster (Where you have to prove you're not a monster by clicking the checkbox) * Math question (Where you have to answer a math question)

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
